headline: Jim Cramer on Constellation Brands: “I’m Excited About the Possibilities Here”
summary: Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE:STZ) is among Jim Cramer’s latest stock calls as he covered Exxon, Lockheed, and others. Cramer showed optimism around the company’s new CEO, as he said: After the close, we hear from a very special company, Constellation Brands, and I’m excited about the possibilities here.
